scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.cf:dev: npm run build -w packages/frontend && wrangler pages dev packages/frontend/dist
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run build -w packages/frontend && wrangler pages deploy packages/frontend/dist
scripts.kv:create: wrangler kv namespace create RESUME_KV && wrangler kv namespace create RESUME_KV --preview
